description.en: Iconic flocking herbivores equipped with dense woolly fleeces and remarkable rectangular pupils that act as a superior early warning system.
description.zh: 极具标志性的群居型食草动物，它们不仅披着极其浓密的羊毛外套，还长有奇特的横向长方形瞳孔，这简直就是一个超级早期预警系统。

anatomy.en: They possess bizarre horizontal, rectangular-shaped pupils! This brilliant evolutionary trait grants them a panoramic 320-degree field of vision, allowing them to spot stalking predators almost directly behind them without even turning their heads.
anatomy.zh: 它们居然长着奇异的横向、呈现长方形的瞳孔！由于这种极其精妙的进化特征，它们获得了高达320度的无死角全景视野空间，这使得它们甚至不用回头，就能直接察觉到正悄悄从它们正后方逼近的捕食者。

ecology_and_behavior.en: Sheep possess an exceptionally strong flocking instinct; feeling isolated causes them extreme stress. They are also incredibly smart when it comes to faces, capable of remembering at least 50 distinct individual faces—both human and sheep—for years!
ecology_and_behavior.zh: 绵羊拥有异常强烈的群居本能；一旦感到被孤立脱队，就会给它们造成极端的心理压力。在认脸方面它们也聪明得出奇，竟能长久记住至少五十张完全不同个体的特殊面庞，而且这不光是羊脸，甚至还包括人脸！

habitat_and_distribution.en: Descended from the wild mouflon of Mesopotamia, they are now ubiquitous worldwide across meadows, hillsides, and grassy plains, tolerating a wide range of climates.
habitat_and_distribution.zh: 作为远古美索不达米亚野生摩弗伦羊的直系后代，如今它们的踪影可以说是遍布全球草甸、山坡和广阔的草原地带，并且对各种气候都有着极强的包容忍耐力。
